creator: sergey_sav@yahoo.com
text: Hi ! I have that problem, i download DVD iso image (FreeBSD-9.1-RELEASE-i386-dvd1.iso) from yours site, install system, but when i try add packages from sysinstall, i hive that error: Disk is not have version number of it, and when i shoes use disk anyway i have: Unable to get paskages/Index file from selected media. I dont have internet connections of this server, on older version of FreBSD like 8.X all be ok ! Thanks !
